mapper.update: update ipaq set q1_days=#{q1Days},q1_hours=#{q1Hours},q1_minutes=#{q1Minutes}, q2_days=#{q2Days},q2_hours=#{q2Hours},q2_minutes=#{q2Minutes}, q3_days=#{q3Days},q3_hours=#{q3Hours},q3_minutes=#{q3Minutes}, q4_hours=#{q4Hours},q4_minutes=#{q4Minutes}, q5_hours=#{q5Hours},q5_minutes=#{q5Minutes}, q6=#{q6},q7=#{q7},score=#{score},status=#{status} where user_id=#{userId} and log_date=#{logDate}
mapper.select: select * from ipaq where user_id=#{userId} order by id desc
select count(0) from ipaq where user_id=#{userId} and log_date=#{date}
